  "findings": [
    "Condenser/heat pump clearance to wall or other units is below the manufacturer's specified minimum."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate the outdoor unit to meet the minimum clearance requirements specified in the manufacturer installation manual.",
    "Re-route and reconnect refrigerant lines, electrical whip, and control wiring as necessary to accommodate the new position."
  ],
  "rationale": "The outdoor unit was installed with clearances below the manufacturer's minimum specifications. Both IMC and IRC M1401 require heating and cooling equipment to be installed in accordance with the manufacturer's installation instructions. Insufficient clearance restricts airflow, reducing system efficiency, capacity, and compressor lifespan.",
  "references": [
    "IMC Section 304.1",
    "IRC Section M1401.2",
    "Manufacturer Installation Manual Clearance Specifications"
  ]
}
